hub.title: Akalola ka account
hub.description: Sungileni ama-order, ifyasungwa, delivery, na ifyo Vergeo5 ilanguka.
hub.ordersBody: Loleni delivery, pickup, na payment pa ushitisha cila umo.
hub.recentEmpty: Ama-product yo mulemona yakalanguka pano pa device.
hub.addressesBody: Ama-landmark na GPS pakuti checkout iyampe bwangu.
hub.helpBody: Amashinda pa ama-order, payment, na account.
hub.deviceNote: Ifyasungwa na recently viewed fisungwa pa device ili. Tefi stock nangu price hold.

saved.title: Ifyasungwa
saved.description: Ama-product yo mwasungile. Yaisa pa device ili.
saved.disclaimer: Ukusunga item tefyo kuletekele stock nangu price.
saved.emptyBody: Tina heart pa product pakuti musunge pa device ili.
saved.loadError: Tatwaishibe ukuleta product. Wesheni nangu fye.
saved.signedOutNote: Mungasunga items pantu mwiingile. Ingileni pakuti musunge ama-order na addresses.

recent.title: Ifyo mwacitile view limbi
recent.description: History iipi ya ama-product ayaisulwa pa device ili.
recent.privacyNote: Yasungwa fye pa browser iyi. Taikwata sync. Mungaisula inshita ili yonse.
recent.emptyBody: Isuleni product page pakuti ilanguke pano.
